action.reasoning: Observation: rmse_z500 improved to 436.74 (val best 436.52) with 48M-param ResNet (h=384/b=18), channel-weighted lat-MSE, 20 epochs; loss plateaus at ~0.02 after initial drop but val RMSE improves gradually. Analysis: time budget now critically low (21min left, last iter ~1.5h), 1 epoch ~4.5min so max ~4 epochs feasible; model under-capacity but scaling further risks timeout/OOM. Decision: resume from best.pt with lower LR=5e-5, CosineAnnealing T=4, 4 epochs, same bs=20; update train.py to support resume+lower lr, keep model/predict unchanged; submit_eval immediately after to lock in potential gains before time expires.
